query:
UPDATE project_templates 
SET config = JSON_SET(
  config,
  '$.logoUrl', (SELECT logoUrl FROM projects WHERE clientName = 'City of Forney' AND logoUrl IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1),
  '$.logoKey', (SELECT logoKey FROM projects WHERE clientName = 'City of Forney' AND logoKey IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1)
)
WHERE name = 'Water Line Mapping';
